# Riverbanc

> Zambia's leading digital loan comparison platform for civil servants. Compare offers from Bank of Zambia-licensed lenders, check eligibility, and refinance at better rates.

Riverbanc helps Zambian civil servants compare loan offers from regulated lenders, enforces the statutory 1/3 net-salary affordability rule, and supports NRC-based identity verification.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview, trust signals, and how the service works.
- [Compare Loans](/compare): Side-by-side loan offers from licensed Zambian lenders with rates, terms, and monthly payments.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): Compliance with Zambia's Data Protection Act No. 3 of 2021.
- [Data Retention Policy](/retention-policy): Retention windows aligned with the Banking and Financial Services Act and FIC Act.
